but its a lot less quanty
What’s your responsibilities at your firm
I’m into trading and quant analysis
so i havent started full time yet
i was just an intern last summer and im transitioning to another firm
but i know what the full timers do
there are many kinds of traders
what specific kind are you asking abt?
or i can go over every kind
Nothing specific just asking to see what you like and work on
yeah so i think the most popular role is an operational/screen trader
its much less quanty than what u think of
i worked at an options market maker and going to another options market maker so it depends on ur desk
but mostly u have pre-trading day prep -> 6.5 hours of trading -> after trading work
you spend most of your time adjusting vols
and keeping an eye on te market
and then after market maybe you'll do some data analysis
ok im not paying attention at all
but there are different kinds of traders too
That sounds interesting. I currently just trade on my own but might be interested to work somewherr in the future
way more money in this industry
first year salary at a top firm like jane street is 700k this year
